settings.accordion_materials:
Material & Care
Our jersey is crafted from premium 100% cotton — no blends, no synthetic shortcuts. The reverse stockinette knit gives the fabric a distinctive, textured surface that feels substantial and structured from the first wear. Finished with ribbed trim at the collar, sleeves, and hem to ensure it holds its shape over time. The more you wear it, the better it feels.

Care Instructions
To preserve the quality, texture, and shape of your jersey, please follow the guidance below:

Machine wash cold at 30°C
Do not bleach
Iron on low heat
Lay flat to dry
Do not tumble dry
settings.accordion_shipping:
Shipping & Delivery
This is a pre-order product. All orders will be dispatched within 4–6 weeks of purchase.

We currently ship to the following countries:
🇬🇧 United Kingdom
🇺🇸 United States
🇦🇺 Australia

Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your location.
Please note: All orders are shipped duty unpaid (DDU). Any customs fees, import duties, or taxes that may be charged upon delivery are the responsibility of the customer. We recommend checking your country's import policies before placing your order.

Once your order has been dispatched, you will receive a confirmation email with your tracking information.

Need to cancel? You can cancel your order at any time before it has been dispatched. Simply email us at support@kuamacollection.com and we'll sort it for you. Once your order has been dispatched, it can no longer be cancelled — please refer to our returns policy if you wish to return your order.
settings.accordion_returns:
Returns
We want you to love your jersey. If for any reason you're not completely satisfied, we're happy to accept returns under the following conditions.
You have 14 days from the date of delivery to notify us that you wish to return your order. You then have a further 14 days to send the item back to us.
To be eligible for a return, your item must be:

Unworn and in its original condition
With all tags still attached
In its original packaging

Items that do not meet these conditions will not be accepted.

Refunds
Once we have received and inspected your return, we will process a refund of the product price to your original payment method within 14 days. Please note that original shipping costs are non-refundable.

Wrong size?
If you need a different size, simply return your item for a refund and place a new order on our website for the correct size, subject to availability.

Return Shipping
Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer. We recommend using a tracked service as we cannot be responsible for items lost in transit.

How to Return
To start a return, email us at support@kuamacollection.com with your order number and reason for return and we'll guide you through the process.
Please note: Bespoke and custom-made orders are non-refundable as they are made specifically for you.
